hero.heading: I'm a Frontend Developer
hero.paragraph: Hi! I am JV and I'm constantly learning and improving to deliver outstanding web experiences. Currently I love to work on web applications using technologies such as React, TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and more.
